title: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer
impact: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat were delayed up to seven seconds or longer.

updates.content:
Title: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer

User impact: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Copilot Chat and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer

User impact: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer.

Current status: Our service health monitoring alerted us to increased latency that's occurring when users are receiving responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat. We're reviewing the latency to identify its source and determine the most effective mitigation strategy.

Scope of impact: Your organization is affected by this event, and any user prompting Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat is impacted.

Next update by: Friday, April 10, 2026, at 9:30 PM UTC

Title: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer

User impact: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer.

Current status: We've identified a recent service change relating to how authentication components are checked during request calls that's increasing the computation and causing latency in the requests, which is resulting in impact. We're disabling the change in an effort to remediate the impact.

Scope of impact: Your organization is affected by this event, and any user prompting Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat is impacted.

Start time: Friday, April 10, 2026, at 6:00 AM UTC

Root cause: A recent service change relating to how authentication components are checked during request calls is increasing the computation and causing latency in the requests, which is resulting in impact.

Next update by: Friday, April 10, 2026, at 9:30 PM UTC

Title: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer

User impact: Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat were delayed up to seven seconds or longer.

Final status: We've disabled the change and confirmed through service health monitoring that the impact has been remediated by our actions.

Scope of impact: Your organization was affected by this event, and any user that prompted Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat was impacted.

Start time: Friday, April 10, 2026, at 6:00 AM UTC

End time: Friday, April 10, 2026, at 9:01 PM UTC

Root cause: A recent service change relating to how authentication components are checked during request calls increased the computation and caused latency in the requests, which resulted in impact.

Next steps: 
 - We're reviewing our service change testing and validation procedures to identify and prevent similar increased computation in deployments moving forward.

This is the final update for the event.
